case_title: DESPANIE, CORNELIUS VS WASHINGTON, MELVIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESPANIE, CORNELIUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BLACK CHAMBER OF COMMERCE DEFT SAN FRANCISCO BLACK CHAMBER OF COMMERCE WAIVES NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
